s: In 2014, R.J. Alvarez suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.130, WHIP 1.000, SO 9, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (SDP -> OAK).

Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> NYM).
